POS Asset Tracking

Know where every piece of POS is.

brandhub's Asset Tracker uses GPS-enabled beacons attached to POS displays, racks, and cold boxes to show you exactly where every asset is in the field — and whether it's active, dormant, or lost.

GPS beacons
Small beacons attach to any POS asset. Ping location every 15 minutes via cellular.

See every device on one map. Filter by territory, status, or account type.

Offline alerts
Automatic alerts when a device goes dark for >48 hours — lost, stolen, or misplaced.
